termsOfService:

2. Changes: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use means you accept the changes.

3. Your Responsibilities: You're responsible for your access to the Application and keeping your account secure. Provide accurate information and notify us of any security breaches.

5. Prohibited Uses: Don't use the Application illegally, to harm others, or to interfere with its operation.

9. Liability: We're not liable for damages from your use of the Application beyond what you paid for it.

12. Governing Law: California law applies, and disputes will be handled in California courts.

13. Entire Agreement: These terms, the Privacy Policy, and EULA are the full agreement between us.

For questions or support, contact us at _EMAIL_.
privacyPolicy:
This privacy policy governs your use of the _COMPANY_ Domain Checker application (Application).

What information does the Application collect?

The Application does not collect, store, or transmit any personal information. We do not require registration, accounts, or login. No cookies are used for tracking. No analytics or telemetry data is collected.

Domain Search Queries
Domain lookups are performed in real-time via direct WHOIS/RDAP queries to public registries. Your search queries are not logged, stored, or shared with any third party. Once a lookup is complete, no record of the query exists on our servers.

Automatically Collected Information
The Application does not collect any information automatically. No IP addresses, device identifiers, browser fingerprints, or usage patterns are recorded.

Third Party Access
No data is shared with third parties because no data is collected. Domain availability lookups go directly to public WHOIS/RDAP registries — we do not use any intermediary lookup services.

Children
The Application does not collect any data from any user, including children under 13.

Security
Because we do not collect or store any user data, there is no personal information at risk.

Changes
This Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy here. Continued use is deemed approval of all changes.

Contact us
If you have any questions regarding privacy while using the Application, please contact us via email at _EMAIL_.
